rulings.Case Title: JIAN CAI MAO et al VS. CHUN YUAN LIN et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 31, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT CHUN LIN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Deny, five (5) days to plead. Proper subservice per CCP 415.20. = (501/REQ)
